VAL-CONTRACT-001.title: Strict Hardware Pinning Failure

steps.expected: Test passes confirming ConfigurationError raised when GPU backend unavailable with explicit device IDs
Test passes confirming ConfigurationError raised when explicit GPU IDs have no routable chunk plan

VAL-CONTRACT-001.evidence: Both tests passed: test_should_raise_configuration_error_when_explicit_gpu_ids_have_no_available_gpu_backend (1 passed, 1.40s) and test_pipeline_fallback_should_raise_configuration_error_when_explicit_gpu_ids_have_no_routable_chunk_plan (1 passed, 0.72s). ConfigurationError is correctly raised when GPU backends are unavailable but explicit device IDs are provided.
